name.en: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
name.hi: आयुष्मान भारत प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना

ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

benefit.en: Cashless secondary and tertiary hospitalisation cover up to rupees 5 lakh per family per year at empanelled hospitals
benefit.hi: सूचीबद्ध अस्पतालों में प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष 5 लाख रुपये तक की निःशुल्क उपचार सुविधा

eligibility_rules_human: Households included in SECC 2011 deprivation criteria (rural) or in specified occupational categories (urban); maintained on the verified beneficiary list by the National Health Authority.

application_paths.offline_office_pattern: Common Service Centre or Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra desk at empanelled hospital
offline_steps: Check eligibility on pmjay.gov.in or by calling 14555
Visit CSC for Ayushman card generation
Use card at empanelled hospitals for cashless treatment
